summary: Iteration 19: Backend Activities Endpoint Performance Optimization testing complete. All 8 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verification PASSED. The batch_enrich_activities() optimization is working correctly - activities load with all enrichment data (author_name, project_name, recipients with client_names, reply_count, unit_reference). Feed page loads in ~3s (down from 56s timeout). Dashboard Control Tower renders correctly with Action Cards and KPI strip.
critical_code_review_comments: batch_enrich_activities() correctly replaces N+1 serial queries with 6 batch queries using $in lookups
MongoDB indexes added for activity_recipients.activity_id, activity_recipients.client_id, activity_replies.activity_id, activities.author_id+created_at
Single enrich_activity() preserved for detail view with include_replies=True
Response shape {activities, total, limit, offset} verified correct
All enrichment fields present: author_name, project_name, recipients (with client_name), reply_count, unit_reference
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimization complete. Activities endpoint now uses batch_enrich_activities() with 6 total queries instead of 56 individual queries. Feed loads in ~3s. All enrichment fields verified present in both list and detail views.

test_activities_endpoint_response_shape.details: Response has correct shape {activities, total, limit, offset}

test_activities_enrichment_fields_presen.details: All activities have author_name, project_name, recipients with client_name, reply_count

test_activities_load_time_under_3_second.details: Activities endpoint responded in under 3 seconds

test_activity_detail_endpoint_enrichment.details: Detail view returns full enrichment with replies array

test_create_activity_returns_enriched_re.details: Create activity returns enriched response with all fields

test_created_activity_appears_in_feed.details: Created activity appears in feed with enrichment

dashboard_control_tower.details: Control Tower renders with Action Cards (2 Change Requests, 2 Pending Invoices, 6 Pending Quotes) and KPI strip (5 Total Clients, 1 Active Projects, 32'400 Revenue CHF, 2 Approved Quotes)

feed_page_loads.details: Feed page loads 9 activities in ~3s with all enrichment data

activity_cards_enrichment.details: Activity cards show author_name (Marc Dubois), type badges (MESSAGE, DOCUMENT, IMAGE), recipients count, timestamps, More/Reply buttons

new_post_dialog.details: New Post button opens CreateActivityDialog with 4 type buttons (Message, Image, Document, Status Update), Project select, and Post button

activity_detail_expand.details: Clicking More button expands activity card
